query: Which tables in BigQuery are missing descriptions?
expected_behavior: Classifies intent as a description coverage audit
Queries for entities where both description and editableDescription are NULL
Projects siblings to check whether a dbt sibling holds the description before marking entity as undocumented
Returns a list of genuinely undocumented entities (not just those missing ingestion-provided descriptions)
Presents results as a table with entity name, platform, and owner
Suggests using /datahub-enrich to add descriptions to the identified entities
